title: KB Guidance Provided
description: Emitted by `kb check <query>` when the vault is queried for coverage confidence. The escalate field is the dynamic cadence signal: false = coast on vault knowledge; true = spawn deer-flow research. Enables tracking of how often Claude defers to vault vs escalates to deep research.

escalate.description: true = vault coverage insufficient, escalate to research

match_count.description: Vault entries that matched the query
